records.ety: [F. avenue, fr. avenir to come to, L. advenire. See Advene.]

defs: A way or opening for entrance into a place; a passage by which a place may by reached; a way of approach or of exit.
quotes: On every side were expanding new avenues of inquiry.

defs: The principal walk or approach to a house which is withdrawn from the road, especially, such approach bordered on each side by trees; any broad passageway thus bordered.
quotes: An avenue of tall elms and branching chestnuts.

defs: A broad street; as, the Fifth Avenue in New York.
